case_title: EDUARDO CHAVARRIA VS. KEVIN WONG ET AL

docket_entries.description: CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF MAY-12-2021 CONTINUED TO JUL-14-2021 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE (TRANSACTION ID # 200033104)

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR AUG-31-2021 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 10:30 AM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). THE JUL-14-2021 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

PERSONAL INJURY/PROPERTY DAMAGE - VEHICLE RELATED, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF CHAVARRIA, EDUARDO AS TO DEFENDANT WONG, KEVIN QUI, HAN YAN DOES 1 TO 50, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR MAY-12-2021 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  FEB-08-2021 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         APR-19-2021
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF AUG-31-2021 IS OFF CALENDAR. DISMISSAL ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
